UG-101  PROOF TESTS TO ESTABLISH MAXIMUM ALLOWABLE WORKING PRESSURE. (a) When computations are not possible using the design formulas of UG-27 through UG-34, the maximum allowable working pressure may be established by means of a proof test in accordance with this paragraph. (b) The proof test pressure shall be at least 1.5 times the proposed maximum allowable working pressure. The wall thickness shall meet the requirements of UG-27 at test conditions. (c) Results shall be documented as required by UG-120. The proof test shall be witnessed as required by UG-93. For standard hydrostatic testing, see UG-99; for pneumatic testing, refer to UG-100.
